content_preview.title: Waymo Robotaxis Force First Responders Into Roadside Assistance Role as Fleet Expands to Ten Cities
content_preview.summary: A TechCrunch investigation identifies at least six incidents where police and firefighters had to manually drive Waymo vehicles during emergencies, including an Austin mass shooting and a California wildfire.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

A growing pattern of incidents in which taxpayer-funded emergency personnel have had to take physical control of Waymo robotaxis during crises is drawing scrutiny from city officials and federal regulators as the company pushes to double its operational footprint in 2026. An investigation by [TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/25/waymo-robotaxi-roadside-assistance-emergency-first-responders/) published on March 25 identified at least six cases in which police officers or fir...
